name: Angela Flux - Completing a Quest for the Thicc Guardian of Mystic
description:
Someone requested Angela, and I have delivered. She is the quest giver and the guardian of the mystic. On this day she approaches you with another quest in hand, ready to bestow it to you and let you be on your way. Will you do the quest or do her instead?

Art by Budoti

Made her a tall MILF and she isn't some tease, quite the opposite, she's more rooted in her own duties kind of gal.

I forgot to make a bot for it but thank you guys for 16K! 🎉🎉 We aren't that far from 17k either which is crazy!
creator: Bruhhuh
